query: We’re cutting a weekend brief across markets—help me connect dots without rabbit holes. To set the baseline: scan one publisher’s stream (bbc)—note any outlier framing. For regional contrast: scan crypto feeds—tweets, exchange posts, gov notes; look for sponsorships and enforcement. As a tech lens: surface this week’s standout dev posts—look for data/infra threads that touch the story. To catch policy angles: check entertainment press—culture spillover and talent deals. For on‑the‑ground signals: pull by category from Moka News—headline + timestamp only. As a market tone check: scan Arabic news API in Arabic—regional framing and vocabulary. For culture crossover: pull anime news from Anime News Net—headline + timestamp only. Meanwhile: pull tags / trending from BizToc—headline + timestamp only. Align time windows across sources when possible (use obvious anchors like the week’s start). Prefer headlines with outlet + timestamp over prose; dedupe close duplicates. Call out crossovers across regions and beats; note anomalies and gaps. If locale/language matters, pick the setting that matches the market.

query: We’re cutting a weekend brief across markets—help me connect dots without rabbit holes. To set the baseline: scan one publisher’s stream (bbc)—note any outlier framing. For regional contrast: scan crypto feeds—tweets, exchange posts, gov notes; look for sponsorships and enforcement. As a tech lens: surface this week’s standout dev posts—look for data/infra threads that touch the story. To catch policy angles: check entertainment press—culture spillover and talent deals. For on‑the‑ground signals: pull by category from Moka News—headline + timestamp only. As a market tone check: scan Arabic news API in Arabic—regional framing and vocabulary. For culture crossover: pull anime news from Anime News Net—headline + timestamp only. Meanwhile: pull tags / trending from BizToc—headline + timestamp only. Align time windows across sources when possible (use obvious anchors like the week’s start). Prefer headlines with outlet + timestamp over prose; dedupe close duplicates. Call out crossovers across regions and beats; note anomalies and gaps. If locale/language matters, pick the setting that matches the market.

query: We’re cutting a weekend brief across markets—help me connect dots without rabbit holes. To set the baseline: scan one publisher’s stream (bbc)—note any outlier framing. For regional contrast: scan crypto feeds—tweets, exchange posts, gov notes; look for sponsorships and enforcement. As a tech lens: surface this week’s standout dev posts—look for data/infra threads that touch the story. To catch policy angles: check entertainment press—culture spillover and talent deals. For on‑the‑ground signals: pull by category from Moka News—headline + timestamp only. As a market tone check: scan Arabic news API in Arabic—regional framing and vocabulary. For culture crossover: pull anime news from Anime News Net—headline + timestamp only. Meanwhile: pull tags / trending from BizToc—headline + timestamp only. Align time windows across sources when possible (use obvious anchors like the week’s start). Prefer headlines with outlet + timestamp over prose; dedupe close duplicates. Call out crossovers across regions and beats; note anomalies and gaps. If locale/language matters, pick the setting that matches the market.

query: We’re cutting a weekend brief across markets—help me connect dots without rabbit holes. To set the baseline: scan one publisher’s stream (bbc)—note any outlier framing. For regional contrast: scan crypto feeds—tweets, exchange posts, gov notes; look for sponsorships and enforcement. As a tech lens: surface this week’s standout dev posts—look for data/infra threads that touch the story. To catch policy angles: check entertainment press—culture spillover and talent deals. For on‑the‑ground signals: pull by category from Moka News—headline + timestamp only. As a market tone check: scan Arabic news API in Arabic—regional framing and vocabulary. For culture crossover: pull anime news from Anime News Net—headline + timestamp only. Meanwhile: pull tags / trending from BizToc—headline + timestamp only. Align time windows across sources when possible (use obvious anchors like the week’s start). Prefer headlines with outlet + timestamp over prose; dedupe close duplicates. Call out crossovers across regions and beats; note anomalies and gaps. If locale/language matters, pick the setting that matches the market.

query: We’re cutting a weekend brief across markets—help me connect dots without rabbit holes. To set the baseline: scan one publisher’s stream (bbc)—note any outlier framing. For regional contrast: scan crypto feeds—tweets, exchange posts, gov notes; look for sponsorships and enforcement. As a tech lens: surface this week’s standout dev posts—look for data/infra threads that touch the story. To catch policy angles: check entertainment press—culture spillover and talent deals. For on‑the‑ground signals: pull by category from Moka News—headline + timestamp only. As a market tone check: scan Arabic news API in Arabic—regional framing and vocabulary. For culture crossover: pull anime news from Anime News Net—headline + timestamp only. Meanwhile: pull tags / trending from BizToc—headline + timestamp only. Align time windows across sources when possible (use obvious anchors like the week’s start). Prefer headlines with outlet + timestamp over prose; dedupe close duplicates. Call out crossovers across regions and beats; note anomalies and gaps. If locale/language matters, pick the setting that matches the market.
